reason: Net-new-resource gate EMPTIED by the stacked PR (#2913) after license assessment (LICENSE_REPORT.md, read 2026-06-11) and counsel review 2026-06-12 (cures logged in the report's counsel-cure log). Enabled by the flip: NLM Clinical Tables + CMS FY2026 ICD-10 data (icd-10-codes — F6: CMS-provenance NOTICE ships beside the redistributed files; comfort-check residual on ICD-10-CM stands), Europe PMC (get_full_text_article — per-article CC licenses), ror.org (search_by_funder — CC0). Not enabled — RE-GATED onto the license gate below: Sanger Cell Model Passports (5 tools; F1, counsel review 2026-06-12). REMOVED outright (not gated) per issuecomment-4713729991: EpiGraphDB (4 tools; F2), CMS MCD SAD exclusion list (1 tool; R4), IPD-IMGT/HLA (2 tools; Y9) — see LICENSE_REPORT.md for the audit trail. REMOVED entirely (#2913): the cms-coverage and npi-registry domains (9 tools) — healthcare-administration data, not life-science research; the directory connectors of the same name remain available via the directory feed. The license gate below is INDEPENDENT of this flip and stays.
license_reason: Tools whose UPSTREAM LICENSE forbids or restricts commercial use are deferred on license status, independently of host novelty: KEGG REST (rest.kegg.jp) is academic-use-only (commercial use licensed via Pathway Solutions); the CADD API (cadd.gs.washington.edu) is free for non-commercial use only; PanglaoDB 403s non-browser clients and its redistribution terms are unverified. Sanger Cell Model Passports (api.cellmodelpassports.sanger.ac.uk) prohibits commercial use and third-party-app API use without prior written consent (depmap.sanger.ac.uk data-usage-policy; LICENSE_REPORT.md F1) — re-gated per counsel review 2026-06-12; counsel additionally requires DepMap-rule training exclusion for Sanger results, which is an org-level data-pipeline control (no transcript-level no-train mechanism exists in this repo — see LICENSE_REPORT.md). These entries are deliberately NOT on the stacked PR's net-new-resources flip — they lift only when the legal pass clears the specific upstream license.
